password.title: Password

password.hintNoPassword: Accounts created via invite or without a local password cannot use this until they set a password from the link.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deactivating your account ends the session and blocks future logins.
danger.cardHint: Only use this if you are sure. To regain access later, you will need to contact support.
danger.dialogDescription: Confirm that you want to disable your user in this system.
danger.dialogAlertBody: You will lose access to the dashboard immediately after confirming and cannot sign in again with this user until support reactivates the account, if applicable.
danger.genericError: Could not disable the account. Please try again.
